Customised Console covers for PS5
description: The aesthetic is centered on a "symbiote takeover," illustrating the raw intensity and transformative power of the Venom symbiote as it attempts to consume Spider-Man.

name: Electrical table
description: Premium electric desk designed for gaming and productivity, featuring motorized height adjustment for seamless switching between sitting and standing. Built with a sturdy frame, spacious surface, and clean cable management to support monitors, PCs, and gaming accessories comfortably. Ideal for long gaming sessions, streaming setups, and professional workstations.

name: 4K Capture Card
description: Captures audio and video sources in a clean 4k format

name: Gaming Webcam
description: They prioritize high-resolution video, fast frame rates, and advanced autofocus systems to ensure smooth and clear streaming.

name: Gaming Microphones
description: High-quality microphone designed for clear voice communication during gaming, streaming, and online chats. Delivers crisp audio, reduces background noise, and improves team communication and content creation.

name: Odyssey  Oled Monitor
description: Premium ultra-wide OLED gaming monitor designed for immersive, high-performance gameplay. The Odyssey OLED delivers stunning visuals with true blacks, vibrant colors, and ultra-fast response times, making it ideal for competitive and cinematic gaming.

name: Goove Tv Backlight
description: Goove back TV lights  are smart LED strip lighting systems designed to sync with your TV's on-screen content to create a theater-like immersive experience. By projecting matching colors onto the wall behind your television, they expand the visual field, enhance contrast, and reduce eye strain during long viewing

name: Mechanical keyboard
description: We offer both wireless and wired mechanical keyboards which can be customized to the user enhanced preferences

name: Gaming headset stands
description: A sleek and durable stand designed to safely hold and display your gaming headset when not in use. Helps keep your gaming setup organized, protects your headset from damage, and adds a clean, professional look to your desk. Some models include RGB lighting, USB ports, or cable management for added convenience.

name: edifier qr30
description: Premium 2.0 desktop speakers with immersive RGB lighting, powerful 30W sound output, Bluetooth connectivity, and sleek modern design—perfect for gaming setups and premium desk aesthetics

name: Mousepads
description: A premium mousepad designed to wirelessly charge your gaming mouse while you play, eliminating the need for cables or manual charging. Features a smooth precision surface, RGB lighting, and built-in power technology for uninterrupted gaming and a clean, professional setup

name: Customised Mousepads
description: A personalized mousepad designed with unique artwork, logos, or gamer tags to match your gaming setup. Built with a smooth precision surface and anti-slip base for accurate mouse control, comfort, and style. Perfect for gamers who want performance while showcasing their own identity and aesthetic.

name: RYZEN 5 5600G
description: A high-performance computer built specifically for gaming, featuring powerful processors, advanced graphics cards, fast RAM, and high-speed storage. Designed to deliver smooth gameplay, high frame rates, and stunning visuals for modern games, streaming, and content creation. Ideal for competitive gamers and immersive gaming setups

name: Logitech G305 LIGHTSPEED Wireless Gaming Mouse
description: magine a mouse that feels like an extension of your hand — sleek, smooth, and poised for action. The Logitech G305 LIGHTSPEED is that wireless weapon of choice: slim but confident, with contours that cradle your grip and a finish that invites touch. It’s as if it silently whispers “ready” every time you pick it up

name: Anime figure
description: This anime figure is pure allure frozen in time. Every curve and detail of the character is sculpted with sensual precision, from the flowing strands of hair that seem to dance in the air, to the form-fitting outfit that highlights every contour. Its dynamic pose radiates confidence and power, like it’s teasing movement just beyond the display.

name: Anime LED Display Boxes
description: Perfect for shelves, desks, or display cabinets, these boxes turn any collectible into a centerpiece, highlighting every contour, color, and detail with cinematic brilliance. Whether you’re a hardcore collector or just starting your anime display, the Anime LED Display Box makes your figures pop with life and energy.

name: Astronaut Galaxy Projector
description: The built-in high-quality speaker lets you play music, stories, or space-themed sounds, enhancing the immersive experience for kids and space enthusiasts alike. Its compact, sturdy design makes it easy to carry, while intuitive controls let anyone set the lights, music, or projector mode in seconds.

name: Hard shell PS5 Console cover
description:
Carry your PlayStation 5 in style with this sleek, premium PS5 carrying bag designed for protection and convenience.
Its padded interior and smart compartments keep your console, controllers, and accessories safe, organized, and ready to go.
Built for gamers on the move, it’s the perfect blend of luxury, durability, and irresistible portability.

name: Cover case for PS5 PORTAL
description:
Protect your PlayStation Portal Remote Player with this sleek, form-fitting cover case designed for style and durability.
Crafted with a shock-resistant exterior and soft inner lining, it shields your device from scratches, drops, and everyday wear.
Lightweight, stylish, and irresistibly premium — it’s the perfect upgrade to keep your PS5 Portal safe, sharp

name: Logitech G29 DRIVING WHEEL/FORCE LATEST NEW FOR PS5/PS4/PC/PS3Logitech G29 DRIVING WHEEL/FORCE LATEST NEW FOR PS5/PS4/PC/PS3
description:
Dominate every track with the Logitech G29 Driving Force Racing Wheel, built with realistic force feedback and premium leather for an immersive racing feel.
Experience precision control with responsive pedals and 900-degree rotation that puts you in the driver’s seat.
Compatible with PS5, PS4, PS3, and PC, it’s the ultimate upgrade for gamers ready to race like pros

name: Logitech G923 TrueForce Racing Wheel
description:
Includes 6-speed manual shifter with push-down reverse gear for added realism.
Programmable dual-clutch launch control for precision starts.
Compatible with PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and PC.
Includes EA Sports WRC, offering immersive rally racing action.
Premium build: leather-wrapped wheel, brushed metal pedals, and integrated LED RPM indicator.

name: PXN V3PRO
description:
Feel the road come alive with the PXN V3 Pro Racing Wheel, built with immersive vibration and responsive controls for true driving excitement.
Its ergonomic grip, smooth steering, and realistic pedals put you in full command of every turn and drift.
Compatible with multiple platforms, it’s the perfect upgrade for gamers ready to race in style and dominate the track.

name: PXN V9 PRO
description:
It features responsive pedals, a 6-speed manual shifter, and ergonomic grip to deliver a true driving simulation feel.
Compatible with PC, PS4, PS3, Xbox, and Nintendo Switch, it’s the perfect racing setup for gamers ready to take the wheel

name: CALL OF DUTY FACEPLATE SHELL TOP COVER CASIGN
description:
Level up your setup with this Call of Duty Casing Topplate — sleek, fierce, and designed to turn heads.
Crafted with precision, it hugs your console or PC with aggressive, battle-ready styling that screams dominance and style.
Bold, durable, and impossible to ignore, it’s the ultimate accessory for gamers who play hard and look unstoppable.

name: META QUEST 3
description:
Step into another world with the Meta Quest 3, the headset that pulls you into virtual reality like a magnet.
Sleek, lightweight, and wireless, it hugs your head comfortably while stunning visuals and intuitive controllers make every movement feel electrifyingly real.
From heart-pounding games to mesmerizing experiences, the Meta Quest 3 tempts you to forget the real world and lose yourself in pure digital adventure.

name: PLAYSTATION VR2
description:
Step into a world of pure immersion with the PlayStation VR2, the next-generation headset that transforms every game into a breathtaking experience.
With 4K HDR visuals, advanced HDR tracking, and adaptive triggers, every movement feels fluid and every scene feels alive, putting you at the center of the action.
Sleek, lightweight, and ergonomically designed, the PS VR2 delivers comfort, precision, and intensity, making every moment in VR feel electrifyingly real
